Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Materially neutral or do we engage the material energy in krishnas service?

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2009-11-05 · 2 answers
The transformation of our sampradaya.....srila bhaktivinoda takura,neutral to material energy,Srila Bhaktisiddanta saraswati takura...elephants and cars on parakrama...Srila A C Bhaktivedanta swami.... Jet -age sanyasis....yukta vairagya where do we draw the line?
user [459] · 2009-11-05
Kalasamvara ...or krishna in the form of time reveals everthing.Iskcon was founded on the application of engaging the material energy in krishnas service.Since our Founder Archarya was incredibly expert in utilising cars,young female devotees,books,video presentations and any number of devices ,including the media to spread krishna conciousness.His followers have failed to achieve the same expertise.....infact many have perished in the same environment.Where to from here?
user [198] · 2009-11-06
sri_govinda_das:Where to from here?

Nowhere from here. We have arrived home, now there is no-where to go. Srila Prabhupada has created this wonderful society for our spiritual benefit. Now enjoy looking at the beautiful deities, enjoy the nectarian prasadam, enjoy the transcendental kirtan, enjoy reading the spiritual literature given by Srila Prabhupada. Just enjoy the whole process of Bhaktiyoga.

Srila Prabhupada gave us a wonderful motto: Books are the basis, purity is the force, preaching is the essence and utility is the principle. We just need to be sincere and follow it wholeheartedly.

ysvt.
dweller-in-peace
